case_title: WELL CALIFORNIA INVESTMENT, LLC, VS. JIA HAO ZHU ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF HENRY YU RE: DAILY FAIR RENTAL VALUE IS $28.33 PER DAY. (TRANSACTION ID # 70073206) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELL CALIFORNIA INVESTMENT, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
